patterns.description: At 4+ CD instances, in-proc or SQL sessions cause sticky session problems. Without shared session state, Application Gateway affinity becomes fragile under load.
patterns.mitigation: Add Redis session state migration to scope. Configure Azure Cache for Redis Premium with VNet integration.

patterns.description: SXA search components + CDN caching layer interact during migration. Stale CDN cache can serve wrong search results or broken search pages.
patterns.mitigation: Coordinate search rebuild, CDN purge, and cache warm-up sequence in cutover window. Add specific validation step.

patterns.description: New Azure IPs have no sending reputation. Sending at full volume immediately will trigger spam filters and damage deliverability.
patterns.mitigation: Plan 2-4 week IP warming ramp with gradual volume increase. Maintain old dispatch path as fallback during warming period.

patterns.description: Custom shard maps don't auto-migrate between SQL instances. Manual shard map recreation required on Azure SQL MI.
patterns.mitigation: Export shard map from source, validate mapping on target, plan extended maintenance window for shard migration.

patterns.description: Media stored in database (not blob) significantly increases DB migration time, database size, and backup complexity.
patterns.mitigation: Consider migrating to Azure Blob storage during replatform. If keeping in DB, plan for larger DB migration window and increased storage costs.

patterns.description: Custom HTTP handlers/modules may reference AWS-specific services (S3 SDK, SES, Secrets Manager, Parameter Store).
patterns.mitigation: Audit all custom handlers for AWS SDK usage, S3 references, IAM dependencies, or AWS service endpoints. Plan code changes.

patterns.description: RDS SQL Server default collation (SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS) usually matches Sitecore's requirement, but custom databases or non-default RDS configs may have mismatches.
patterns.mitigation: Verify collation on all databases matches SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS. Test with Sitecore before cutover.

patterns.description: Certificate pinning in integrations, mobile apps, or partner systems will break when new Azure certificates are issued.
patterns.mitigation: Identify all pinned certificates, coordinate with integration teams for pin updates, plan staged rollout with monitoring.

patterns.description: Dedicated Publishing Service (.NET Core) needs its own VM and configuration on Azure, including separate connection strings.
patterns.mitigation: Include Publishing Service VM in compute provisioning. Update connection strings and service configuration.

patterns.description: Scheduled tasks using AWS Lambda, CloudWatch Events, or EventBridge need Azure equivalents (Azure Functions, Logic Apps, or Windows Task Scheduler).
patterns.mitigation: Inventory all scheduled tasks, determine Azure equivalent for each, migrate and test scheduling.

patterns.description: Large databases (200+ GB total) require extended migration windows. Network transfer time and index rebuild time can exceed maintenance windows.
patterns.mitigation: Use Azure Database Migration Service with continuous sync. Plan pre-migration bulk copy followed by delta sync at cutover.

patterns.description: Azure Cache for Redis requires SSL by default (port 6380). If current ElastiCache uses non-SSL (port 6379), Sitecore Redis provider config must change.
patterns.mitigation: Update Sitecore Redis connection strings to use SSL. Test session state behavior over SSL connection.

patterns.description: Multiple web databases (for staging, A/B testing, or multi-site) multiply database migration and publish target configuration effort.
patterns.mitigation: Map all web database publish targets, migrate each, update Sitecore publish target configurations.

patterns.description: Multi-region deployments require Azure geo-replication, Traffic Manager, and region-specific resource provisioning.
patterns.mitigation: Plan region-by-region migration. Set up geo-replication for databases. Configure Traffic Manager for failover.

patterns.description: Custom cache clearing strategies that use AWS services (SNS/SQS for cache invalidation across instances) need Azure equivalents.
patterns.mitigation: Replace with Azure Service Bus or Sitecore's built-in cache clearing. Test publish and cache clear flow.
